description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and create a striped pattern, alternating between raised stone and recessed channels. The block is solid and has a dark, slightly mottled stone texture, suggesting it is made from a dense material like granite or basalt. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the textured top. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments. There are no visible signs of damage, markings, or weathering, giving it a clean and modern look.
description: A solid, rectangular stone block with a grooved, striped top surface and smooth, dark sides. The grooves create a striking pattern, giving the block a modern, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horizontal grooves running across the top surface, emphasizing the striped pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the stripes running perpendicular to the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, again showing the horizontal grooves and the block's solid, rectangular form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the vertical alignment of the grooves and the block's thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
